LightningComponentBundle.description: Show a message when the order confirmation page is unavailable, with options to redirect the user to the order details page.

property.name: guestUserButtonText
property.label: Guest User Button Label
property.description: Enter a label for the button that navigates the guest users to the Order Lookup page.

property.name: authUserButtonText
property.label: Logged-in User Button Label
property.description: Enter a label for the button that navigates the logged-in users to the Order History page.
